name: web-search-plus-plugin-v2
description: OpenClaw plugin: multi-provider web search (Serper/Google, Brave, Tavily, Linkup, Querit/Multilingual AI Search, Exa/Neural+Deep, Firecrawl, Perplexity, You.com, SearXNG) with intelligent auto-routing. Requires at least one configured provider API key or SearXNG instance URL.

env.SERPER_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Serper/Google API key
env.BRAVE_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Brave Search API key
env.BRAVE_COUNTRY: optional Brave Search country code override used by the Brave provider
env.BRAVE_SEARCH_LANG: optional Brave Search language override used by the Brave provider
env.BRAVE_SAFESEARCH: optional Brave Search safesearch default used by the Brave provider (strict|moderate|off)
env.TAVILY_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Tavily research API key
env.LINKUP_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling source-grounded search, Linkup API key
env.EXA_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Exa neural search API key
env.QUERIT_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Querit multilingual search API key
env.FIRECRAWL_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search and extraction metadata, Firecrawl API key
env.PERPLEXITY_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, Perplexity AI search API key
env.KILOCODE_API_KEY: alternative hosted-provider option for enabling Perplexity-compatible search via Kilo.ai gateway
env.YOU_API_KEY: one supported hosted-provider option for enabling search, You.com search API key
env.SEARXNG_INSTANCE_URL: one supported self-hosted-provider option for enabling search, SearXNG instance URL
env.SEARXNG_ALLOW_PRIVATE: optional danger flag; true disables SSRF/private-network protection for SearXNG and should only be used on fully trusted private networks

author: robbyczgw-cla
